# MigrationStatus

**Enumeration**

A type the containing app uses to determine the status of a completed import.

## Declaration

```swift
enum MigrationStatus
```

## Overview

After the first time the app launches, check this type’s static variable [doc://AppMigrationKit/documentation/AppMigrationKit/MigrationStatus/importStatus] to determine whether a migration took place and, if so, whether it succeeded. To determine the status, check to see if `importStatus` is non-`nil` and that its value is [doc://AppMigrationKit/documentation/AppMigrationKit/MigrationStatus/success]. After a successful migration, notify the person using the app that migration succeeded, and call the static method [doc://AppMigrationKit/documentation/AppMigrationKit/MigrationStatus/clearImportStatus()].

## Accessing the import status

- **importStatus**: A property to indicate the status of import from another device into the app.
- **clearImportStatus()**: Sets the import status to a nil value to prevent further notification.

## Examining migration statuses

- **MigrationStatus.success**: The migration completed successfully.
- **MigrationStatus.failure(_:)**: The migration failed with an error.
